---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with the PCB, mechanical design, or documentation
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

### Describe the Bug

A clear, concise description of the problem.

### Reproduction Steps

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

### Expected Behavior

What should have happened instead?

### Hardware / Setup Details

- **PCB revision** (if known): [e.g., v1.0 from Gerber file date]
- **Power supply voltage** (measured): [e.g., 3.82 V]
- **Motors connected?**: [Yes / No]
- **3D printer & material** (for mechanical issues): [e.g., Ender 3, PLA+]
- **Battery type**: [e.g., Turnigy 1S 300mAh]

### Measurements

If applicable, include measurements taken:

| Test Point | Expected | Measured | Notes |
|-----------|----------|----------|-------|
| 5V rail | 5.0V ± 0.25V | ___ V | |
| 7.35V rail | 7.35V ± 0.5V | ___ V | |
| NE555 OUT (U1) | ~4.8 Hz square | ___ | |
| Motor voltage | ±7.35V alternating | ___ | |

### Screenshots / Photos

If applicable, attach photos or oscilloscope screenshots.

### Additional Context

Anything else that might help diagnose the problem.
